article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.15. CR – Fire Protection Systems and Equipment Installation Mtnce and Repair Services 2026-04-14 .pdf

briefs.title: Council to vote on: Renewing fire protection services contract with A.W Fireguard
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to vote on renewing a contract with A.W Fireguard Supplies (1991) Ltd. to inspect, maintain, and repair fire protection and emergency lighting systems at City buildings — a three-year deal worth roughly $1.67 million (taxes included), running July 2026 to June 2029.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the council decision on April 14, 2026 — this affects fire services at City facilities.

key_dates.label: Burnaby fire protection services contract renewal — proposed start date
Burnaby Council vote on fire protection contract renewal
